template_data.lead_html: From "zero past performance" to first federal prime — via one subcontract.

rows.what_html: Sub position secured — cloud migration on a large agency task order
Past performance documented — every deliverable, every review, on the record
First prime contract awarded — the history built as a sub won the room

template_data.closer: THE DOOR WAS OPEN. THEY JUST NEEDED TO SEE IT.
template_data.image_prompt: Infographic story layout. Left side: illustrated professional timeline with 3 milestone nodes labeled 'SUB SECURED', 'PAST PERF BUILT', 'PRIME WIN'. Right side: illustrated professional in business blazer, confident posture, walking toward a federal building silhouette. Bold headline top: 'TEAMING IS THE FASTEST ON-RAMP'. Small navy callout box: '18 MONTHS · ZERO TO PRIME'. Cream background, dark navy accents and timeline. Footer text: 'Josh Ladick · GSA Focus'.
